mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_medicine WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != '중단' AND start_date <= CURDATE() AND end_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT medicine_id) FROM medicine_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND taken_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND CURDATE() AND status = '복용완료'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_medicine WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != '중단' AND start_date <= CURDATE() AND end_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT medicine_id) FROM medicine_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND taken_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY) AND CURDATE() AND status = '복용완료'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_medicine WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != '중단' AND #{date} BETWEEN start_date AND end_date

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, item_seq AS itemSeq, item_name AS itemName, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, daily_count AS dailyCount, dose_time AS doseTime, status, memo, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM user_medicine WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != '중단' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date
